item.title: Config surface update for OpenClaw v0.8.6–v0.8.10 environment variables
item.intent: ClawHQ must track OpenClaw's config surface so the config generator, validator, and reference docs stay current. Ten new env vars were added or fixed across v0.8.6–v0.8.10 — they need to be in our schema and docs.
item.description: OpenClaw v0.8.6–v0.8.10 introduced or fixed the following environment variables: WEBSOCKET_EVENT_CALLER_TIMEOUT (configurable WS timeout, was hardcoded 60s), VECTOR_DB=mariadb-vector (new vector DB backend), OPENID_END_SESSION_ENDPOINT (custom OIDC logout), USER_PERMISSIONS_ACCESS_GRANTS_ALLOW_USERS (disable individual sharing), DEFAULT_GROUP_SHARE_PERMISSION, ENABLE_AUDIT_STDOUT (was broken, now works), WEB_SEARCH_DOMAIN_FILTER_LIST (was broken, now works), REPORTING_ENDPOINTS (CSP reporting), OAUTH_UPDATE_NAME_ON_LOGIN, OAUTH_UPDATE_EMAIL_ON_LOGIN. Update: (1) src/config/schema.ts to include new fields, (2) docs/OPENCLAW-REFERENCE.md config inventory section, (3) config generator to set sensible defaults where appropriate (especially WEBSOCKET_EVENT_CALLER_TIMEOUT and ENABLE_AUDIT_STDOUT). Also add a minimum version note to OPENCLAW-REFERENCE.md — ClawHQ now assumes v0.8.6+ baseline.
acceptanceCriteria: src/config/types.ts includes type definitions for all 10 new environment variables
docs/OPENCLAW-REFERENCE.md config inventory lists the new variables with version introduced
Config generator sets WEBSOCKET_EVENT_CALLER_TIMEOUT and ENABLE_AUDIT_STDOUT defaults for new agents
OPENCLAW-REFERENCE.md states minimum OpenClaw version as v0.8.6
Existing config validation tests pass with no regression
